articles.description: Andrew Benson analyses what we have learned during the first month of the new F1 rules, and the problems that need to be addressed.
articles.title: F1's new rules: The thorny issues facing the sport over racing, qualifying and safety

articles.description: All the latest from the FA Cup news conferences as Arne Slot and Liam Rosenior speak to the media before the quarter-finals begin.
articles.title: FA Cup news conferences LIVE: Slot and Rosenior speaking before quarter-finals

articles.description: Tony Pulis explores why Tottenham are in such a mess and what their new manager Roberto de Zerbi might do to change things as they seek to stay in the Premier League.
articles.title: Tony Pulis column: What Roberto de Zerbi needs to do to turn Tottenham around

articles.description: Chris Sutton takes on boxer Richard Riakporhe plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's FA Cup quarter-finals.
articles.title: FA Cup predictions: Chris Sutton v boxer Richard Riakporhe - and AI

articles.description: Rayan Cherki caused a social media stir at the Carabao Cup final - and the Manchester City midfielder will hope to steal the show again in Saturday's FA Cup quarter-final against Liverpool.
articles.title: Rayan Cherki: Is Man City star a tamed maverick or a maverick untamed?

articles.description: A decade after Leicester unexpectedly won the Premier League, FC Thun of Switzerland are closing on one of football's greatest underdog triumphs.
articles.title: How 'Swiss Leicester' Thun ran away with the Super League

articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC radio commentaries from nine games across Division 1 and 2 of the County Championship.
articles.title: County Championship Cricket LIVE: Scores, radio commentary & updates from nine games

articles.description: For the first time in 28 years, no athlete has been found to have taken a banned substance at an Olympics - so far.
articles.title: Winter Olympics 2026: No positive doping tests during Milan-Cortina Games

articles.description: The Oklahoma City Thunder condemn the Los Angeles Lakers to one of the heaviest defeats in their history, as Luka Doncic suffers an injury.
articles.title: NBA: Oklahoma City Thunder thrash Los Angeles Lakers as Luka Doncic injured

articles.description: Six thousand Port Vale fans will travel to Chelsea on Saturday to cheer on the struggling League One side in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup.
articles.title: Port Vale v Chelsea in FA Cup: Hurtling towards relegation - but can Vale shock Chelsea in FA Cup?
